info.title: GoldRush Multichain Data APIs
info.description: Covalent's GoldRush Multichain Data APIs OpenAPI Schema.

get.description: Fetch paginated transactions for up to 10 EVM addresses and 10 EVM chains with one API call. Useful for building Activity Feeds.

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Comma separated list of chain names or IDs to retrieve transactions from. Defaults to all foundational chains.

parameters.name: addresses
parameters.description: Comma separated list of addresses for which transactions are fetched.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of transactions to return per page, up to the default max of 100 items.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Pagination cursor pointing to fetch transactions before a certain point.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Pagination cursor pointing to fetch transactions after a certain point.

parameters.name: with-logs
parameters.description: Whether to include raw logs in the response.

parameters.name: with-decoded-logs
parameters.description: Whether to include decoded logs in the response.

parameters.name: with-internal
parameters.description: Whether to include internal transfers/transactions.

parameters.name: with-state
parameters.description: Whether to include all transaction state changes with before and after values.

parameters.name: with-input-data
parameters.description: Whether to include the transaction's input data such as the Method ID.

parameters.name: quote-currency
parameters.description: The currency to convert. Supports `USD`, `CAD`, `EUR`, `SGD`, `INR`, `JPY`, `VND`, `CNY`, `KRW`, `RUB`, `TRY`, `NGN`, `ARS`, `AUD`, `CHF`, `GBP`, `BTC` and `ETH`.

updated_at.description: Timestamp for when the data was last updated.

cursor_before.description: Pagination cursor pointing to the previous page.

cursor_after.description: Pagination cursor pointing to the next page.

block_signed_at.description: The signed block timestamp in UTC.

block_hash.description: The hash of the block. Use it to remove transactions from blocks that are reorged.

tx_offset.description: The offset is the position of the tx in the block.

miner_address.description: The address of the miner who mined the block.

value.description: b;The value of the transaction in wei.

value_quote.description: The value attached in `quote-currency` to this tx.

pretty_value_quote.description: A prettier version of the quote for rendering purposes.

gas_offered.description: The gas offered for the transaction.

gas_spent.description: The gas actually spent by the transaction.

gas_price.description: The gas price at the time of this tx in wei.

pretty_gas_quote.description: A prettier version of the quote for rendering purposes.

gas_quote_rate.description: The native gas exchange rate for the requested `quote-currency`.

fees_paid.description: b;The total transaction fees (`gas_price` * `gas_spent`) paid for this tx, denoted in wei.

contract_decimals.description: Use contract decimals to format the token balance for display purposes - divide the balance by `10^{contract_decimals}`.

contract_name.description: The string returned by the `name()` method.

contract_ticker_symbol.description: The ticker symbol for this contract. This field is set by a developer and non-unique across a network.

contract_address.description: Use the relevant `contract_address` to lookup prices, logos, token transfers, etc.

supports_erc.description: A list of supported standard ERC interfaces, eg: `ERC20` and `ERC721`.

gas_metadata.description: The requested chain native gas token metadata.

successful.description: Indicated whether the transaction was successful or failed.

chain_id.description: The chain ID of the blockchain where the transaction occurred.

chain_name.description: The chain name of the blockchain where the transaction occurred.

explorers.description: The block explorer links for this transaction.

block_signed_at.description: The block signed timestamp in UTC.

tx_offset.description: The offset is the position of the tx in the block.

log_offset.description: The offset is the position of the log entry within an event log.

raw_log_topics.description: The log topics in raw data.

sender_contract_decimals.description: Use contract decimals to format the token balance for display purposes - divide the balance by `10^{contract_decimals}`.

supports_erc.description: A list of supported standard ERC interfaces, eg: `ERC20` and `ERC721`.

sender_factory_address.description: The address of the deployed UniswapV2 like factory contract for this DEX.

log_events.description: Event logs generated by the transaction.

from_address.description: The contract address sending the native token.

to_address.description: The internal transfer recipient wallet address.

value.description: b;The value of the internal transfer in wei.

gas_limit.description: The gas available from the parent transaction or contract call.

internal_transfers.description: List of internal transfers/transactions associated with the wallet address.

balance_before.description: b;The balance of the native token before the transaction in wei.

balance_after.description: b;The balance of the native token after the transaction in wei.

storage_address.description: The specific storage slot in the contract's storage space.

value_before.description: The hex value stored in the slot before the transaction.

value_after.description: The hex value stored in the slot after the transaction.

storage_changes.description: List of before and after values in the storage address.

nonce_before.description: The transaction count for this address before the transaction.

nonce_after.description: The transaction count for this address after the transaction.

state_changes.description: List of state changes with before and after values and balances for involved contract and wallet addresses.

method_id.description: The first 4 bytes of the invoked smart contract function signature. Used to identify the function being called in the contract.

input_data.description: Object with a transaction's input data such as the Method ID.

items.description: List of transactions returned by the API.

get.description: Fetch paginated spot & historical native and token balances for a single address on up to 10 EVM chains with one API call.

parameters.name: walletAddress
parameters.description: The requested address. Domain names (e.g. `demo.eth`) NOT supported.

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Comma separated list of chain names or IDs to retrieve token balances from. Defaults to all foundational chains.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of token balances to return per page, up to the default max of 100 items.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Pagination cursor pointing to fetch token balances before a certain point.

parameters.name: cutoff-timestamp
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp to retrieve the balance snapshot from the nearest block before the specified cutoff time.

parameters.name: quote-currency
parameters.description: The currency to convert. Supports `USD`, `CAD`, `EUR`, `SGD`, `INR`, `JPY`, `VND`, `CNY`, `KRW`, `RUB`, `TRY`, `NGN`, `ARS`, `AUD`, `CHF`, `GBP`, `BTC` and `ETH`.

updated_at.description: Timestamp for when the data was last updated.

cursor_before.description: Pagination cursor pointing to the previous page.

contract_decimals.description: Use contract decimals to format the balance for display purposes - divide the balance by `10^{contract_decimals}`.

contract_name.description: The string returned by the `name()` method.

contract_ticker_symbol.description: The ticker symbol for this contract. This field is set by a developer and non-unique across a network.

contract_address.description: Use the relevant `contract_address` to lookup prices, logos, token transfers, etc.

contract_display_name.description: A display-friendly name for the contract.

supports_erc.description: A list of supported standard ERC interfaces, eg: `ERC20` and `ERC721`.

last_transferred_at.description: The timestamp when the token was transferred.

is_native_token.description: Indicates if a token is the chain's native gas token, eg: ETH on Ethereum.

is_spam.description: Denotes whether the token is suspected spam.

balance.description: b;The asset balance. Use `contract_decimals` to scale this balance for display purposes.

balance_24h.description: b;The 24h asset balance. Use `contract_decimals` to scale this balance for display purposes.

quote_rate.description: The exchange rate for the requested quote currency.

quote_rate_24h.description: The 24h exchange rate for the requested quote currency.

quote.description: The current balance converted to fiat in `quote-currency`.

quote_24h.description: The 24h balance converted to fiat in `quote-currency`.

pretty_quote.description: A prettier version of the quote for rendering purposes.

pretty_quote_24h.description: A prettier version of the 24h quote for rendering purposes.

chain_id.description: The chain ID that this balance is on. eg: `1`.

chain_name.description: The chain name that this balance is on. eg: `eth-mainnet`.

chain_display_name.description: A display-friendly name for the chain.

items.description: List of token balances returned by the API.

get.description: Used to get a paginated list of current or historical token holders for a specified ERC20 or ERC721 token.

parameters.name: chainName
parameters.description: The chain name eg: `eth-mainnet`.

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: The requested address. Passing in an `ENS`, `RNS`, `Lens Handle`, or an `Unstoppable Domain` resolves automatically.

parameters.name: no-snapshot
parameters.description: Defaults to `false`. Set to `true` to bypass last snapshot and get the latest token holders list.

parameters.name: block-height
parameters.description: Ending block to define a block range. Omitting this parameter defaults to the latest block height.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Ending date to define a block range (YYYY-MM-DD). Omitting this parameter defaults to the current date.

parameters.name: page-size
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Note: Currently, only values of `100` and `1000` are supported. Omitting this parameter defaults to 100.

parameters.name: page-number
parameters.description: 0-indexed page number to begin pagination.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the response was generated. Useful to show data staleness to users.

chain_tip_height.description: The latest block height of the blockchain at the time this response was provided.

chain_tip_signed_at.description: The timestamp of the latest signed block at the time this response was provided.

contract_decimals.description: Use contract decimals to format the token balance for display purposes - divide the balance by `10^{contract_decimals}`.

contract_name.description: The string returned by the `name()` method.

contract_ticker_symbol.description: The ticker symbol for this contract. This field is set by a developer and non-unique across a network.

contract_address.description: Use the relevant `contract_address` to lookup prices, logos, token transfers, etc.

supports_erc.description: A list of supported standard ERC interfaces, eg: `ERC20` and `ERC721`.

balance.description: b;The asset balance. Use `contract_decimals` to scale this balance for display purposes.

has_more.description: True if there is another page.

page_size.description: The requested number of items on the current page.

total_count.description: The total number of items across all pages for this request.
